sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀπολείχω

- Transliteration: Apoleicho

- Phonetic: ap-ol-i'-kho

- Definition:

1. to lick off, lick up

- Origin: "from G575 and leicho (to "lick")"

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G575 and λείχω leichō (to lick); to lick clean: - lick.
